fields.summary: Refactor authentication middleware to use dependency injection
fields.description:
The current auth middleware directly instantiates its dependencies (user repository, token validator). This makes it hard to test and violates DI principles.

## Scope
- Refactor AuthMiddleware to accept dependencies via constructor
- Update all usages in the app startup
- Add unit tests for the middleware with mocked dependencies

## Files likely affected
- src/middleware/auth.py
- src/app.py
- tests/test_auth.py (new)
